title: emilia charlesii
intro: Emilia charlesii, also known as Indian milkmaid, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Indian milkmaid is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties.
